title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the office of Ombudsmen and defining their investigative powers, procedures for handling complaints against public service agencies and state enterprises, and mechanisms for ensuring administrative accountability and transparency.
